case_title: ERWING-DAVIS, YVONNE M VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNI)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNI)
